import re
import unicodedata

# Arabic diacritics pattern
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel_pattern = re.compile(r'[\u0640]')

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = str(s)
    # Convert to NFC
    s = unicodedata.normalize('NFC', s)
    # Remove diacritics
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    # Remove tatweel
    s = tatweel_pattern.sub('', s)
    # Unify hamza variations to bare alif?
    # Replace Alif with hamza forms to alif
    s = re.sub('[\u0622\u0623\u0625]', 'ا', s)  # آأإ -> ا
    # Replace yaa' maqsoora to yaa
    s = s.replace('ى', 'ي')
    # Taa marbuta to ha? maybe keep as ta marbuta normalized to ه? We'll keep as ة to ه? Many normalizations use ه
    # But to avoid mismatches, replace ة with ه perhaps? We'll convert to ه.
    s = s.replace('ة', 'ه')
    # Remove punctuation and non-Arabic letters digits
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF\s]', ' ', s)
    # Collapse whitespace
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    # Lowercase
    return s

def token_set_similarity(a, b):
    # token-based F1-like
    set_a = set(normalize_ar(a).split())
    set_b = set(normalize_ar(b).split())
    if not set_a or not set_b:
        return 0.0
    inter = len(set_a & set_b)
    prec = inter / len(set_a)
    rec = inter / len(set_b)
    if prec+rec == 0:
        return 0.0
    f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    return f1

def lcs_similarity(a, b):
    # Compute longest common subsequence length on normalized strings (not substring)
    na = normalize_ar(a)
    nb = normalize_ar(b)
    # For efficiency, but strings are not huge
    la, lb = len(na), len(nb)
    # Use dynamic programming with reduced memory
    prev = [0]*(lb+1)
    for i in range(1, la+1):
        curr = [0]*(lb+1)
        ca = na[i-1]
        for j in range(1, lb+1):
            if ca == nb[j-1]:
                curr[j] = prev[j-1]+1
            else:
                curr[j] = max(prev[j], curr[j-1])
        prev = curr
    lcs_len = prev[lb]
    # Normalize by average length or max length? We'll use average as robust.
    denom = (la+lb)/2 if (la+lb) else 1
    return lcs_len/denom

def composite_similarity(a, b):
    return (token_set_similarity(a,b)*0.4 + lcs_similarity(a,b)*0.6)

test = "لَوْ كَانَ الرَجُلُ يَعْلَمُ أَنّي أَنَا اللَهُ لَم يَزَل يَعُدُني عَلَيْهِ"
normalize_ar(test), token_set_similarity(test, "يا ابن آدم مرضت فلم تعدني")
composite_similarity(test, "يا ابن آدم مرضت فلم تعدني")

full_span = "لَوْ كَانَ الرَجُلُ يَعْلَمُ أَنّي أَنَا اللَهُ لَم يَزَل يَعُدُني عَلَيْهِ"
snippet_span = "لَوْ كَانَ...ي عَلَيْهِ"

def difflib_ratio(a, b):
    return difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, normalize_ar(a), normalize_ar(b)).ratio()

def evaluate_candidates(text, candidates):
    results = []
    for idx, cand in enumerate(candidates):
        sim = composite_similarity(text, cand)
        ratio = difflib_ratio(text, cand)
        tok = token_set_similarity(text, cand)
        lcs = lcs_similarity(text, cand)
        results.append((sim, ratio, tok, lcs, idx, cand))
    results.sort(reverse=True)
    return results[:20]

    # choose hadithTxt or Matn; prefer Matn if present
    txt = h.get('Matn') or h.get('hadithTxt') or ''

        hadith_texts.append(txt)
